nasb.text: So the sons of Levi did as Moses instructed, and about three thousand men of the people fell that day.

esv.text: And the sons of Levi did according to the word of Moses. And that day about three thousand men of the people fell.

cnv.text: 利未的子孫照著摩西的話作了；那一天，人民中被殺的約有三千人。

ccb.text: 利未人便照摩西的话去做。那一天，约有三千人被杀。
